name: FLEXIBLE SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL INC
business: The company sells four product lines: a chemical (EWCP) for swimming pools and spas to reduce evaporation and energy use; biodegradable polymers (TPAs) for corrosion and scaling prevention, agriculture, and food; nitrogen conservation products for agriculture; and food grade products.
sellsTo: petroleum, chemical, utility, and mining industries

exposures.sentence: Activity in the oil and gas industry, as we sell our TPA product to oil and gas companies;
The third product line is nitrogen conservation products used for the agriculture industry.
We have four product lines. The first is a chemical (EWCP) used in swimming pools and spas.

catalysts.event: Spending $50,000 on marketing and production of WATERSAVR product
catalysts.sentence: We expect to spend $50,000 on the marketing and production of our WATERSAVR product in fiscal 2026.
